name: feishu-group-meeting
description: Manage Feishu/Lark group meeting schedules with pull, query, rotation, reschedule, reminder, and push workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Feishu/Lark group meeting schedule rotation.
interface.longDescription: Pull a Feishu Docx or Wiki group meeting schedule into Markdown, query current presenters, rotate weekly speakers, reschedule meeting time, draft/send reminders, and push updates back to Feishu.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Feishu group meeting skill to check this week's presenters.
